description: Supportive, community-focused club voice with warmth and encouragement. Generic exemplars; the renderer substitutes the user's hashtag and club name at render time.
exemplars:
Huge well done to Emily on her stunning PB in the 100m Butterfly last night at the Spring Open! 🦋
Emily touched the wall in 1:02.45 — knocking nearly two seconds off her previous best.
So proud of the hard work she has put in this season!
Well done Emily — the whole club is behind you 💙
#YourClub #ButterflyGirl #ClubProud

Congratulations to our Junior Boys relay team for a brilliant performance at the Regional Age Groups! 🏊
The lads went 3:34.12 in the 4×100 Medley — a new club record!
Massive effort from the team — you all deserve this result 🙌
So proud of every single one of you!
#YourClub #TeamSwim #ClubRecord

A huge shout-out to Sophie who claimed a fantastic silver medal in the 200m Breaststroke at the Regional Championships today! 🥈
Sophie swam 2:41.76 — another PB to add to her growing collection!
We love watching you race, Sophie — keep it going! 💙
#YourClub #RegionalChamps #Breaststroke

What a night at the club gala! 🌟
Special mention to young Ollie, 11 years old, who smashed his PB in the 50m Freestyle with a time of 29.88 — breaking the 30-second barrier for the first time!
Big things ahead for this lad 💪
Proud of all our swimmers tonight — every single one of you worked hard and it showed!
#YourClub #YoungSwimmers #FutureStars

Brilliant results for our masters swimmers at the Short Course Open last weekend!
Special mention to Margaret, who set three personal bests and won gold in the W55 100m Backstroke in 1:24.33! 🥇
Proof that hard work pays off at any age — incredible stuff Margaret!
#YourClub #MastersSwimming #NeverStopSwimming

starting_phrases: Congratulations to our Junior Boys relay
What a night at the club
Brilliant results for our masters swimmers
sign_offs: So proud of every single one of you!
